entities.name: INDIAN SEMI ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Semi-arid tropical region in India characterized by monsoon vagaries and surface water scarcity

entities.name: RUNOFF HARVESTING
entities.description: Traditional facilities used to collect and store rain runoff in semi-arid regions

entities.name: GROUNDWATER
entities.description: Water stored in aquifers, which has shifted from a community to a private resource

entities.name: OPEN WELLS
entities.description: Shallow wells used for groundwater extraction and as a means for low-cost groundwater recharge

entities.name: SHALLOW AQUIFERS
entities.description: Near-surface water-bearing geological formations

entities.name: BORE WELL TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Technology used to extract groundwater from deeper aquifers, often subsidized

entities.name: DEEPER AQUIFERS
entities.description: Deep water-bearing geological formations subject to mining effects

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: Atmospheric precipitation that is adequate to recharge aquifers in the Indian SAT

entities.name: KOTHAPALLY
entities.description: A watershed in Rangareddy district, AP, where the groundwater recharge study was conducted

entities.name: DIVERSION OF CLEAN RAIN RUNOFF
entities.description: The method of directing rain runoff into failed open wells to recharge groundwater

entities.name: IRRIGATED AREA
entities.description: Land area receiving water for crops, which increased due to enhanced groundwater availability

entities.name: RABI SEASON
entities.description: The winter cropping season in India

entities.name: POST RABI SEASON
entities.description: The season following the rabi crop

entities.name: FODDER
entities.description: Crops grown for animal feed, with increased area due to better irrigation

entities.name: MILCH ANIMALS
entities.description: Livestock kept for milk production

entities.name: MILK PRODUCTION
entities.description: The output of milk from milch animals, which increased due to better fodder

entities.name: FLOWERS
entities.description: Commercial ornamental crops with increased area due to better irrigation

entities.name: VEGETABLES
entities.description: Commercial edible crops with increased area due to better irrigation

entities.name: ANNUAL CROPS
entities.description: Crops that complete their life cycle in one year, showing increased yield

entities.name: INCOME
entities.description: Financial earnings of farmers, which increased due to improved agricultural productivity

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD OPPORTUNITIES
entities.description: Economic and social possibilities for farmers, enhanced by increased income
